mapper.insert: INSERT INTO booking (id_, user_id, booking_num, booking_date, from_, to_, status_, remark_, enable_, create_by, create_time, update_by, update_time) VALUES (#{id_}, #{userId}, #{resNum}, #{resDate}, #{from_}, #{to_}, #{status_}, #{remark_}, #{enable_}, #{createBy}, #{createTime}, #{updateBy}, #{updateTime})
mapper.update: UPDATE booking SET user_id = #{userId}, booking_num = #{resNum}, booking_date = #{resDate}, from_ = #{from_}, to_ = #{to_}, status_ = #{status_}, remark_ = #{remark_}, enable_ = #{enable_}, update_by = #{updateBy}, update_time = #{updateTime} WHERE id_ = #{id_}
UPDATE booking SET status_ = #{status} WHERE id_ = #{id}
mapper.select: SELECT * FROM booking WHERE id_ = #{id} AND enable_ = 1
SELECT * FROM booking WHERE booking_num = #{resNum} AND enable_ = 1
